_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: subcutaneously transplanted human MPNSTs were eliminated within 1 month with vehicle treatment... tumors treated with ADU-S100 only or with ADU-S100 plus anti–PD-1 started shrinking soon after treatment
details: Vehicle-treated tumors were eliminated within 1 month due to immune rejection, while ADU-S100 and combination treatments accelerated this rejection process
